query:
SELECT cp.id as cpa_id, cp.project_id, p.name FROM cpa_projects cp JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.project_id;
SELECT pc.id, pc.cpa_project_id, cm.code, pc.supervision_fee_method, pc.supervision_submitted FROM cpa_project_consultants pc JOIN cpa_consultants_master cm ON cm.id = pc.consultant_id ORDER BY pc.cpa_project_id, pc.id
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT cp.id as cpa_id, cp.project_id, p.name FROM cpa_projects cp JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.project_id;
SELECT pc.id, pc.cpa_project_id, cm.code, pc.supervision_fee_method, pc.supervision_submitted FROM cpa_project_consultants pc JOIN cpa_consultants_master cm ON cm.id = pc.consultant_id ORDER BY pc.cpa_project_id, pc.id
